creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Sun Jan 20 08:25:15 2013
New Revision: 310676
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310676

Log:
  - Update to 0.12.0
  
  Changes:	http://docs.saltstack.org/en/latest/topics/releases/0.12.0.html
  PR:		ports/175357
  Submitted by:	Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/salt/Makefile
  head/sysutils/salt/distinfo
  head/sysutils/salt/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/salt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/salt/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 06:45:20 2013	(r310675)
+++ head/sysutils/salt/Makefile	Sun Jan 20 08:25:15 2013	(r310676)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	salt
-PORTVERSION=	0.11.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.12.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 
@@ -11,12 +11,13 @@ COMMENT=	Distributed remote execution an
 
 LICENSE=	AL2
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pyzmq>=2.1.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pyzmq \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Jinja2>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-Jinja2 \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}msgpack>=0.1.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-msgpack \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}m2crypto>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-m2crypto
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 FETCH_ARGS=	-pRr
 USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
